title: 2b2p SMP Structures
body:
# 2B2P SMP STRUCTURES
A structure mod that adds houses, buildings, etc from the AlphaSMP or the 2b2p smp.

_Always download the newest versions unless you want bugged spawns._

**THIS IS MEANT TO BE PLAYED WITH THE BROKEN SCRIPT.** 

> https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script
